verses.text: Tua ciangin Teman khuami Elifaz in Job dawng a
“Job aw, mawk paupau kei in! Nang' pau bangin mipilte pau ngeilo a
bangmaha kimanglo kampaute paulo a, phattuamna omlo dingpi-in thu seello uh hi
Ahi zongin nangmah in Pasian zahtakna na beisak a, ama mai-ah thugenna ding na khaktan hi
Tu-in na mawhna thu na kam pan hong gingkhia a, ngian zangin na kampau tawh na mawhna na seel hi
Na mawhna thu kei' hong gen kisamlo a, na pauna khempeuh in na mawhna hong langsakta hi
“Mihinga a piang lakah a masa pen kisa na hi hiam? Pasian in mualte a bawl lai-in a piang khin kisa na hi hiam
Pasian' vaihawmnate a za simin kingaihsun na hiam? Nang bek in pilna khempeuh a nei-in kingaihsun na hi hiam
Ko' theihloh thu bang thei tuan na hi hiam? Ko' muhloh thu bang mu tuan na hi hiam
Na pa' pian'ma-a a piang puteek samkangte' tung panin kote in ka pilnate uh a ngah ka hi uh hi
“Pasian in nang hong hehnem hi; bang hangin nialnial na hi hiam? Kam khum kam neem tawh Pasian' tangin nang tungah thu kong gen uh hi
Ahih hangin na lung khauhin kote nong heh et hi
Pasian' tungah a heh na hi a, amah a simmawh na hi hi
“Mihinga a piang peuhmah paubaang hetloin siangtho taktak zo ding ahi hiam? Pasian' tungah a thumanzo kua om ding ahi hiam
Pasian in a siangtho vantung mite nangawn muanglo ahih leh, ei mawhnei mite bang hangin hong muang mah ding ahi hiam
Mihing in tui i dawn bangin siatna i dawndawn a, mihing pen siahuai-in bangmah i man kei hi
“Job aw, ka thutheihte na ngai in

Amaute tung bekah gam kipia ahih manin, amaute a pialkhiatpih ding gamdang mi tawh a kihello, a pu a pate un bangmah imloin thu a hilh suksuk uh mipilte' thugente kong gen ding hi. Tua a gen uh thute in
“Mi a nengniam migilopa in a khan' tawntungin lungkhamna thuak ding hi
Launa ding awging a bilah za ngitnget ding a, lungmuangin a om laitakin gutate in buluh ding hi
Lungzin'na pan suahtakna ding lametna omlo a, amah a that dingin mun khatah namsau in ngak khinkhian a
amah a ne dingin musanete in a ngak uh hi. A mailam thu lungzin'huai ahihna thei hi
A thahat kumpi khat bangin lungkhamna leh lungzin'na in amah a hihgawp dingin a ngak khikhe hi
“Pasian langpangin a khuttum a lahsan, Vanglianpa a dem mipa in hih bang thute a thuak hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in khauhtakin Pasian langpangin, a lum sahpi tawh a lehdo hi
“A thatang muan'huai-in a pumpi a liat hangin
ama ten'na khuapi sia-in, ama inn kinusia ding a, a sawtloin ninbulomtang suak ding hi
Amah sauvei haulo ding a, a neihsate kiplo ding hi. Ama liim nangawn maimang ding a
khuamial panin suaktalo ding hi. Amah pen a hiangte mei in a kattumsak, a paakte huih in a letkhiatsak, singkung tawh kibang ding hi
Amah in gitlohna suan'in nei ahih manin, gitlohna bek mah ngahkik ding hi
A hun a tun' ma-in amah bei ding a, singhiang bangin keu-in hingkik nawnlo ding hi
A min ma-in a gahte a pulh leenggui bang ding a, a paakte a pulhmang khin oliv kung bang ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian a ngaihsun lote mi cimang suak a, sumgolh tawh a kilam innte mei in kangtum hi
Mihingte in siatna ding bek ngaihsunin sem uh a, mi khem ding bekbek ngaihsun niloh uh hi,” a ci hi.
